etymology.description: phonetic 戌(戌) (xū, "ninth month") + semantic 火(火) (huǒ, "fire") = character used as phonetic 'huǐ'
etymology.interpretation: The character combines 戌(戌) (xū, "ninth month" or phonetic indicator) with 火(火) (huǒ, "fire") to convey a burning or destructive quality, making it a suitable candidate for use in phonetic contexts where 'huǐ' is needed.
